---
name: Feature / new section
about: Suggest a new section, topic, or resource
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What you propose

A brief description of the idea: which section to add, which topic to cover, which resource to include.

## Why it's needed

What problem it solves and who benefits. One or two paragraphs.

## Where to add it

Into an existing stage (specify the number) or as a new section.

## Sources and materials

Books, articles, and videos you plan to draw on.

## Willing to write it yourself?

- [ ] Yes, I'm ready to open a PR
- [ ] No, just floating the idea for others
